name: adobe
description: Adobe eSign & PDF MCP - local PDF tools (info, text extraction, merge/split, form fields) plus Adobe Acrobat Sign e-signature workflows
notes: PDF tools (pdf_get_info, pdf_extract_text, pdf_merge, pdf_split, pdf_extract_pages, pdf_get_form_fields, pdf_fill_form) work with no setup beyond `pip install -r core/mcp/requirements.txt`. Adobe Sign tools (adobe_sign_*) require an Acrobat Sign OAuth app — run /adobe-esign-setup once. OAuth tokens are stored at ~/.claude/adobe_sign_tokens.json, never committed.
